name: ERPSMART Builder Studio Demo Journey Contract
purpose: Document the UI-first demo journey, manual browser smoke expectations, safety notices, and forbidden effects for Builder Studio.
safety_notices: No runtime module will be generated from the UI in this MVP
manual_smoke_steps: confirm index counts and create draft CTA
edit identity, fields, form layout, automation, capabilities, and relations
confirm no runtime module was created
future_module_lifecycle_roadmap: remove existing modules that should not be available in the app
show disable/archive before destructive removal in future demos
require dependency checks, data retention rules, backups, rollback rules, and RAG updates before lifecycle execution

notes: Current UI does not expose delete, publish, uninstall, or rollback.
Future lifecycle demos should show archive and disable before any destructive removal path.
Delete/uninstall/rollback require a separate Builder Module Lifecycle task.

agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may guide the demo journey through read, save, validate, and preview.
AI Builder Agent must not claim publish exists.
Module lifecycle/removal requires a separate safety-critical task with dependency checks, data retention rules, rollback rules, and RAG updates.
